routing.description: Lead routing configuration for CWDB. All qualified homeowner leads are delivered simultaneously to all active contractors. Contractor contact info is looked up at runtime from HubSpot — not hardcoded here.

contractor_source.note: All HubSpot contacts with lifecyclestage=customer are treated as active contractors and receive every qualified lead. Current active contractors (as of 2026-04-15): Ben Barton (Barton Builders LLC) and John Garcia (John Garcia Construction). Both cover the full Wausau Metro service territory.

routing.fallback_rule: If no active contractors found in HubSpot (lifecyclestage=customer) — hold the qualified lead and send admin alert to slogarjw@gmail.com with subject: [ACTION REQUIRED] Qualified Lead — No Active Contractors Found. Do not drop the lead.
routing.multi_contractor_rule: Active. All contractors with lifecyclestage=customer in HubSpot receive every qualified lead simultaneously. No territory exclusivity in current phase.
